Tech. Bioinformatics Alumni Pursuing MS/PHD in World Class Universities Ms. Vinamrata Sharma (B.Tech. Bioinformatics) Roll No: 201904 Batch: 2020-2024 Ms. Vinamrata Sharma has been admitted to the prestigious Doctoral Program in Informatics at the School of Informatics, Computing, and Engineering at Indiana University (IU) for the academic year 2024. Mr. Raghav Luthra (B.Tech Bioinformatics) Roll No: 191903 Batch: 2019-2023 Mr. Raghav Luthra (B.Tech. Biotechnology) one of our alumni got admission in Northeastern University, Boston Course: MS in Engineering Management Kushal Chakraborty 181507 2018-2022 Received  offers letter for Masters Program in Bioinformatics MS: Joining the Master's in bioinformatics from Eberhard Karls University of Tubingen in Germany very soon Qualified GAT-B with rank 129 in General Category Admission offer for M.Tech under self sponsored category in the department of bioscience and bioengineering at IIT jodhpur M.Tech in Computational biology at Pondicherry University Chhavi Thakur 171518 B.Tech BI ( 2017-2021 ) Received multiple offers for Doctorate of Philosophy (Ph.D.) program in Bioinformatics; 5 years fully funded PhD offer from Indiana University Bloomington, USA and also selected as the youngest Ph.D. candidate at Indiana University. They awarded her with five years of financial support, which includes (1) a job as an associate instructor/research assistant with a competitive stipend; (2) five-year remission of all tuition fees and costs; (3) health insurance; and (4) travel allowances for academic meetings.  She also receives 6 offer letters from other University in abroad PhD Indiana University, Bloomington, USA – Ph.D. IN INFORMATICS WITH SPECIALISATION IN BIOINFORMATICS University of Tübingen, Germany 69th Rank - Masters in bioinformatics (fully funded) Saarland University, Germany in association with Maxwell institute - Masters in Bioinformatics (Fully funded) University of Illinois Chicago, USA- Masters in Bioinformatics- #103 in National Universities. University of Nebraska, Omaha, USA – Masters in Biomedical informatics with an offer of Graduate assistantship. Northeastern University - Masters in Regulatory affairs, Canada She has7 publications in B.Tech and awarded B.Tech. in Bioinformatics with Honors. Muskan Kapoor 171501 2017-2021 Received multiple offers for Masters Program in Bioinformatics, Data Science and AI however received a direct PhD offer from Iowa State University, USA in Bioinformatics and Computational Biology. She got offers MS: 1. The University of Texas at Dallas, USA - Biomedical     Engineering 2. University of Utah, USA- Biomedical Informatics 3. University of Colorado Denver, USA- Bioengineering 4. University of Bonn, Germany- Life Science Informatics Ph.D. 1.  Iowa State University, USA - Bioinformatics and Computational Biology. 2.
